roa.docketEntryComment: SET ASIDE 995PC
SET ASIDE 995PC
DEFT MO 995PC GRTD
MATTER OFF CALENDAR;DEFT MO 995PC GRTD IN S22 ON 10/21/93
TRANSF TO D28 F/W
SUBM ON RPT,CRIM PROC REINS;TOBE HSE AT SF GENL HOSPCONT 10/8/93 AT 1030AM FOR PTC,11/8/93 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22
DEFT ORDERED RETURNED FROM NAPA SH
DEFT APP WVD;SUBM ON FILED MED RPT,CT FND DEFT MENTALLY INCOMP STND TRIALCT ORD DEFT TOBE PLACED ATASC SH;MAX TERM EXC 3Y;CRIM PROC S/S;REMAND CDC
DEFT APP WVD;CNSL SUB ON MED RPT,CT FND DEFT INCOMPETENT;CRIM PROC S/SMATTERREFER TO DR KORPI FOR PLACEMENT
DEFT APP WVD;CT APPTS DR CASSIDY TO EXAM DEFT PURS 1368PC
CT APPTS DR MCHECKO GRAVES MATTHEWS EXAM DEFT PURS 1368PC
PD REQ FOR 1017/730 RPT;CT APPT DR CASSIDY FOR EXAM;DEEMED PRETRIED
PD APPTD;ARR;NG PLEA ENTERED EA CT;DEN ALLEGS;DEFT PERS ENT GEN T/WAIVER
HTA, BAIL SET AT $10,000
SUBM ON FILED MED RPT,CT FND DEFT MENTALLY COMPETENT;CRIM PROC REINSCAUSE REMANDED MUNI CT DEPT 11(CONT 9/23/92 9AM-FUR PROCEEDINGS)
CT FNDS DFT MENTALLY COMPT TO STND TRIAL, CRIM PROC REINCT FNDS DFT MENTALLY COMPT TO STND TRIAL, CRIM PROC REIN
SUBM ON DR KORPI RPT 6/2891,CT ORD DEFT TRANSPORTED ATASC SH;MAX EXCD 3YR
SUBM ON RPT OF DR CASSIDY 6/5/91 DEFT FND INCOMPTNT;REF CONREP PLCMNT RPT
CRIM PROC S/S;CT ORD DR E/ROBERT CASSIDY TO EXAM DEFT PURS 1368PC
1368PC CERTIFIED TO SUP CT, 5-24-91
PX TO STAND
STAY AWAY FROM RUDY MEDINA, B/S $10,000
